twitter.copy: 🚀 Trust, Purity, and Reliability since 1975! 🚀 Bisleri leads the pack with 130 operational plants and a robust distribution network across India and neighboring countries. #Bisleri #TrustedBrand #WaterYouWaitingFor
twitter.call_to_action: Learn more about Bisleri's commitment to quality and service

instagram.copy: 🌎 A symbol of trust, purity, and reliability, Bisleri has been a household name in India for decades. 🌟 With a strong footprint of 130 operational plants, including 13 owned facilities, and a robust distribution network of 5980 distributors and 8270 distribution trucks across India and neighboring countries, Bisleri leads its category with a promise of delivering safe, pure, and healthy drinking water. 🌿 For over 50 years, Bisleri has stayed true to its commitment to quality and service. 💧 #Bisleri #TrustedBrand #WaterYouWaitingFor
instagram.call_to_action: Learn more about Bisleri's commitment to quality and service
